a11y: Wrap in <nav aria-label="Main"> to give the landmark a name.
Keyboard: Tab / Shift+Tab navigates top-level items; submenus open on Enter/Space/ArrowDown.
description: A horizontal menu whose triggers reveal a shared floating panel. NavigationMenu/List/Item/Trigger/Content/Link/Viewport/Indicator.
name: navigation-menu
rationale: Mirrors the Figma `Navigation menu` (1696:13337): a horizontal menu whose triggers reveal a shared floating panel. Built on Base UI's NavigationMenu; the panel uses the `--ds-color-popover` surface. The Content of every item is portaled into the single Popup/Viewport rendered by `NavigationMenu`, and the `NavigationMenuIndicator` arrow points at whichever trigger is currently open.
title: Navigation Menu
